SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.agent

Class HumanAgent

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.HumanAgent
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAgent, RiskListener, Cloneable
public class HumanAgent extends Object implements IAgent
An agent controlled by a human player via the UI. Blocking calls (getAction(edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView, int, boolean), IAgent.placeOneArmy(edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView, boolean, int)) create a CompletableFuture and wait for the Swing EDT to complete it via submitAction(edu.bu.pas.risk.action.Action) or submitPlacement(edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory).

    • HumanAgent

      public HumanAgent(int agentId)

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentGameView

      public GameView getCurrentGameView()
      Returns the most recent game view snapshot passed to this agent.
      Returns:
      The current game view, or null if no action has been requested yet.

    • getInputMode

      public HumanAgent.InputMode getInputMode()
      Returns the current input mode of this agent.
      Returns:
      The current input mode.

    • getCurrentActionCounter

      public int getCurrentActionCounter()
      Returns the action counter from the most recent getAction(edu.bu.pas.risk.GameView, int, boolean) call.
      Returns:
      The current action counter.

    • canCurrentlyRedeemCards

      public boolean canCurrentlyRedeemCards()
      Returns whether the agent is currently allowed to redeem cards.
      Returns:
      true if card redemption is available.

    • getCurrentRemainingArmies

      public int getCurrentRemainingArmies()
      Returns the number of armies this agent has left to place.
      Returns:
      The remaining army budget.

    • isCurrentIsDuringSetup

      public boolean isCurrentIsDuringSetup()
      Returns whether the current placement is during the initial setup phase.
      Returns:
      true if placement is during setup.

    • setOnInputModeChanged

      public void setOnInputModeChanged(Runnable callback)
      Registers a callback that fires whenever the agent's input mode changes.
      Parameters:
      callback - The callback to run on input mode change.

    • agentId

      public int agentId()
      Returns the agent's unique id and turn order, e.g. 0 for the player who goes first, 1 for the player who goes 2nd, etc.
      Specified by:
      agentId in interface IAgent
      Returns:
      The unique, sorted, agent id.

    • getAction

      public Action getAction(GameView game, int actionCounter, boolean canRedeemCards)
      Returns this agent's choice of an action at the given game state.

      The Risk code will call this method many times, until you return a FortifyAction or a NoAction to end your turn. Every time this method is called, we increment the actionCounter by 1. This means at the start of your turn, it will always be 0.

      The order of actions is as follows:

      1. Any number, including 0 RedeemCardsActions
      2. Any number, including 0 AttackActions
      3. If eliminating an agent gives you 6 or more territory cards, then you must immediately trade in enough sets to reduce your hand to 4 or fewer cards. But once your hand is reduced to 4, 3, or 2 cards, you must stop trading.
      4. Exactly 1 of FortifyAction or NoAction (to skip fortify)
      Specified by:
      getAction in interface IAgent
      Parameters:
      game - The game state.
      actionCounter - How many actions you have taken so far this turn. Starts at 0 always.
      canRedeemCards - If you are allowed to send in a RedeemCardsAction. This is true when you have not started your attack phase, and have enough cards to trade in. This is also true when you have eliminated an opponent and now have 6 or more territory cards.
      Returns:
      The action you choose to do at this point in the game.

    • submitPlacement

      public void submitPlacement(Territory territory)
      Completes the pending army placement with the given territory. Called from the Swing EDT.
      Parameters:
      territory - The territory to place an army on.

    • submitAction

      public void submitAction(Action action)
      Completes the pending action request with the given action. Called from the Swing EDT.
      Parameters:
      action - The action to submit.
